mapper.select:
SELECT DN , SERIAL , OBJECTCLASS , CN , SN , MAIL , TIMEID , RAFLAG , STATUS , POLICY , CID , SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 1, 4)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 6, 2)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 9, 2) ISSUEDATESTR , ISSUEDATE , SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 1, 4)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 6, 2)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 9, 2) EXPIREDATESTR , EXPIREDATE , SUBSTR(CN, 1, LOCATE('(',CN)-1) CUSTNAME FROM OPPRA.LDAP_INFO WHERE
USERID = #{userId} AND EXPIREDATE >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND RAFLAG = '1' AND POLICY = #{policy} ORDER BY POLICY DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY WITH UR

SELECT SERIAL ,DN ,OBJECTCLASS ,USERCERTIFICATE ,CN ,SN ,MAIL ,USERID ,TIMEID ,POLICY ,RAFLAG ,STATUS ,CID ,SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 1, 4)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 6, 2)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 9, 2) ISSUEDATESTR ,ISSUEDATE ,SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 1, 4)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 6, 2)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 9, 2) EXPIREDATESTR ,EXPIREDATE FROM LDAP_INFO WHERE SERIAL = #{serial} WITH UR

SELECT DN ,SERIAL ,OBJECTCLASS ,CN ,SN ,MAIL ,USERID ,TIMEID ,RAFLAG ,STATUS ,POLICY ,CID ,SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 1, 4)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 6, 2)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(ISSUEDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 9, 2) ISSUEDATESTR ,ISSUEDATE ,SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 1, 4)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 6, 2)||SUBSTR(CAST(CAST(EXPIREDATE AS DATE) AS CHAR(10)), 9, 2) EXPIREDATESTR ,EXPIREDATE ,USERCERTIFICATE FROM LDAP_INFO WHERE USERID = #{userId} AND RAFLAG = '1' WITH UR
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM LDAP_INFO WHERE 1 = 1 AND USERID = #{userId} AND POLICY = '16' WITH UR

SELECT B.SERIAL SERIAL ,B.ISSUER ISSUER ,B.USERID USERID ,B.IDNUM IDNUM ,B.EXPIRED EXPIRED ,B.REGISTERD REGISTERD ,B.OID OID FROM INFO B, (SELECT MAX(EXPIRED) EXPIRED ,MAX(REGISTERD) REGISTERD ,OID ,USERID FROM INFO WHERE USERID = #{userId} GROUP BY USERID ,OID) A WHERE A.OID = B.OID AND A.EXPIRED = B.EXPIRED AND A.REGISTERD = B.REGISTERD WITH UR
